title: Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026 is officially released by KSEAB. Check complete Class 10 exam dates, subject-wise schedule, and download the SSLC timetable PDF here.

content.text: Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board has officially released the updated Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026 for Class 10 on the official website on 26 March 2026. The revision affects the Third Language exam which was earlier scheduled for 30 March 2026 and has now been shifted to 31 March 2026.

Students can check the revised exam schedule and download the official notification PDF through the direct link provided here. The SSLC exams are currently underway from 18 March 2026 to 02 April 2026. Students can access the updated time table using their registration details or by visiting the board portal. End with a short note advising users to verify all details carefully and contact the board in case of any discrepancy.

The Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026 has been officially updated by the Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board to accommodate the revised public holiday schedule. The overall examination period remains unchanged, but one key subject date has been adjusted to ensure smooth conduct of exams across the state.

rows: Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board
Mahavir Jayanti holiday advanced to 30 March 2026
Remain unchanged as per original timetable

sections.heading: Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: The Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026 subject wise schedule is now updated with the latest change for the Third Language exam. The board has clearly stated that only this one subject has been rescheduled while the rest of the examination dates stay the same. Students appearing for the ongoing SSLC exams must note this important revision to avoid any last-minute confusion.
All remaining subjects in the Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026 will be conducted on their originally announced dates between 18 March 2026 and 02 April 2026.
Download the SSLC Time Table 2026 Change Circular PDF here

links.text: Download the SSLC Time Table 2026 Change Circular PDF here

sections.heading: How to Download Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the updated Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026 from the official website of the board. The process is simple and takes only a few minutes.

items: Open the official website of the Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board in your browser.
Navigate to the notifications or circulars section on the homepage.
Search for the latest update dated 26 March 2026 regarding the Third Language exam change.
Click on the link for the Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026 revision circular.
The PDF file will open - save it to your device by selecting the download option.
Open the saved file, read the revised date clearly and take a printout for ready reference during exam preparation.

content.text: Students are advised to check the official timetable carefully and keep a copy for exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026

content.text: The updated Karnataka SSLC Time Table 2026 circular contains all essential information about the date revision for the Third Language subject. The document provides clear instructions for schools, exam centres and students.

items: SSLC examinations are being held from 18 March 2026 to 02 April 2026.
Third Language exam shifted from 30 March 2026 to 31 March 2026.
Change made due to Mahavir Jayanti holiday now observed on 30 March 2026.
All other subjects will follow the original timetable released on 04 November 2025.
Question papers printed with the old date of 30 March 2026 will be used on 31 March 2026.
District and taluk education officers must inform all exam centres immediately.
Exam centre chiefs and school heads must brief all staff and students about the change.
Request sent to Deputy Commissioners and Police Superintendents for necessary security arrangements on the revised exam day.
